$comment: UPTOWN Restaurant core facts. Verbatim from uptown-restaurant.de (impressum, anfahrt, oeffnungszeiten, partyservice) + drinks placemat. Captured 2026-07-07. Do not invent values.
name: UPTOWN Restaurant & Bistro
legalEntity: UPTOWN, Peter Witt und Ulf Bierbaum GbR

contact.phoneNote: staffed from 15:00 (ab 15 Uhr); call for table reservations

location.note: No map/coordinates published on the site (Google Maps module not active on anfahrt.html).

openingHours.note: Authoritative — from oeffnungszeiten.html; confirmed by drinks placemat 'Sonntag + Montag RUHETAG'.

partyService.description: Homemade specialities plus matching drinks, at the customer's home or in the restaurant, tailored to their wishes.
partyService.booking: Phone 0451 / 707 95 65, email uptown@t-online.de, or in person at Kronsforder Allee 3a.

policies.allergens: List available on request; ask staff.

siteStatus.menuDelivery: The real menu is published only as placemat ('Tischset') PDFs/images, not as page text.

promotions.name: Smoke-Town-Ribs satt
promotions.notes: All you can eat; no doggy bag; no voucher redemption

promotions.name: Scampi "satt"
promotions.notes: 2-hour all-you-can-eat prawns; booking + deposit required; prepay only; 2026 dates: 3 Feb, 3 Mar, 7 Apr, 5 May, 2 Jun, 7 Jul, 4 Aug, 1 Sep, 6 Oct, 3 Nov, 1 Dec
